languages.text: "Это церемония благодарности мирянину, по случайности или разумению содействующему избавлению от слабостей плоти".

traits.locale_text: {n}Магос, с живым любопытством вслушивающийся в ритмичные литании, босает на вас заинтересованный взгляд.{/n} "Это церемония благодарности мирянину, по случайности или разумению исцеляющему Машинный дух железного тела".

languages.text: "It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."
languages.original_text: "Это церемония благодарности мирянину, по случайности или разумению содействующему избавлению от слабостей плоти".

traits.locale_text: "It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in the purging of the frailties of the flesh."
"It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."
"It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, healed the machine spirit of an iron body."
"It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in the purging of the frailties of the flesh."
"It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."
"It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."

languages.text: 「偶然や洞察によって、鉄の体を機械霊が癒した一般人の感謝の儀式である」
languages.original_text: "It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, healed the machine spirit of an iron body."

languages.text: "Şans eseri veya içgörüyle, etin zayıflıklarının arındırılmasına yardım eden sıradan birine şükran töreni."
languages.original_text: "It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."

traits.locale_text: "Şans eseri veya içgörüyle, etin zayıflıklarının arındırılmasına yardım eden sıradan birine şükran töreni."

languages.text: “这是一场感恩仪式，献给凭借机缘或洞察力协助我们清除了血肉脆弱之处的教外人士。”
languages.original_text: "It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."

traits.locale_text: “这是一场感恩仪式，献给凭借机缘或洞察力协助我们清除了血肉脆弱之处的教外人士。”

languages.text: "Es ist eine Zeremonie der Dankbarkeit für {mf|einen Laien, der|eine Laiin, die} aus Zufall oder Einsicht geholfen haben, die Schwächen des Fleisches zu reinigen."
languages.original_text: "It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist eine Zeremonie der Dankbarkeit für {mf|einen Laien, der|eine Laiin, die} aus Zufall oder Einsicht geholfen haben, die Schwächen des Fleisches zu reinigen."

languages.text: « Il s'agit d'une action de grâce adressée à un individu profane qui, par chance ou perspicacité, a permis d'éliminer les faiblesses de la chair. »
languages.original_text: "It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."

traits.locale_text: « Il s'agit d'une action de grâce adressée à un individu profane qui, par chance ou perspicacité, a permis d'éliminer les faiblesses de la chair. »

languages.text: «Es una ceremonia para alguien laico que, por casualidad o intuición, ha contribuido a purgar las debilidades de la carne».
languages.original_text: "It is a ceremony of gratitude for a layperson who, by chance or insight, has aided in purging the frailties of the flesh."
